CustomField.description: Tracks the lifecycle state of this Recurring Donation. Active: installments are being created on schedule. Lapsed: payments are overdue. Paused: temporarily suspended. Closed: permanently ended. Updated automatically by the Recurring Donations batch job or manually by users.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The current state of this recurring donation: Active (ongoing), Lapsed (overdue), Paused (temporarily suspended), or Closed (permanently ended).
CustomField.label: Status
